title: DSP Layout Content Requirements
text: DSP Layout Content Requirements Each Layout Mode has different requirements for DSP layout content: Generated Mode: DSP layout content should be empty. Any content is ignored since the layout template provides the complete HTML structure, including the <html> , <head> , and <body> tags, with a placeholder for component binding. The placeholder is dynamically replaced with the content provided by the component widget during rendering. Fragment Mode: DSP layout content should contain valid HTML fragment content—elements that would appear within a <body> section, such as navigation, content areas, and component binding placeholders. Full Document Mode: DSP layout content must contain a complete HTML document with <!DOCTYPE> , <html> , <head> , and <body> elements. DSP layout is the content specified in the Design Layout worksheet of the IDE or loaded from external files. This layout is added to the web response by the weblayout ProcScript statement.
